channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Catholic League accuses Whitmer of mocking Eucharist with Dorito
item.description: Podcaster Liz Plank posted a video on her Instagram showing herself being fed a Dorito by Whitmer, who's standing above Plank.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hears at a Latino campaign event from someone who lived in the US illegally
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Minutes after Donald Trump delivered his standard warnings about drug dealers and criminals illegally crossing the border during a Saturday campaign event, the former president heard from someone who was once in the country illegally but now plans to vote for him.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris outpaces Trump in Pennsylvania, but trails in Arizona: Poll
item.description: The New York Times/Philadelphia Inquirer/Siena College survey, released Saturday, shows Harris leading Trump 50 percent to 47 percent among likely voters in the Keystone State.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Why is Donald Trump campaigning in California, a state he's almost certain to lose?
item.description: COACHELLA, Calif (AP) — With the presidency on the line in battlegrounds like Wisconsin and Pennsylvania, why would Donald Trump venture into California, one of the most solidly Democratic states, just weeks before Election Day? Trump is almost certain to lose California, and that won't change after
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD and MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris-Walz campaign targets hunters, fishermen for support
item.description: The Harris-Walz campaign launched a new coalition designed to draw voter support from outdoorsmen in swing states
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago spent $80K to renovate office for first lady Johnson as city faces billion dollar budget shortfall
item.description: Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson is facing scrutiny after the city spent $80,000 to renovate an office for first lady Stacie Johnson while facing a nearly billion-dollar budget shortfall.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York gun control regime handed defeat in court
item.description: A federal judge in New York struck down a state ban on carrying concealed firearms on all private property, reasoning it is unconstitutional under Supreme Court precedent.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Data shows migrants aren’t taking jobs from Black or Hispanic people, despite what Trump says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump promises the biggest deportation event the U.S. has ever seen if he is elected — a promise he has predicated, in part, on the notion that immigrants in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Key disaster loan program 'quickly exhausting' funds after hurricanes
item.description: Officials are warning a key federal program that provides disaster loans to businesses and homeowners is running critically low on funds in the aftermath of back-to-back hurricanes, increasing the pressure on Congress to return to Washington.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Fight for House raging in districts ringing NYC where Trump struggled but other Republicans thrived
item.description: Voters in a ring of congressional districts encircling New York City where Republican candidates often do well but Donald Trump struggled in 2020 could decide which party controls the U.S. House for the next two years.
item.dc:creator: Anthony Izaguirre, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: VP Harris releasing detailed medical report, challenging Trump to do the same
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris will release medical records and health information on Saturday in an effort to draw contrast with former President Trump, who is 79.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kremlin sowing chaos with bomb threats and bribery to thwart Moldova's vote to join EU, authorities say
item.description: Buying off voters, calling in bomb threats and paying protesters to antagonize police — these are the tactics authorities say the Kremlin has taken up to thwart an upcoming election in Moldova.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Trump is headed into 'the belly of the beast': The strategy behind his blue state stops
item.description: With less than four weeks to go until Election Day in his margin-of-error race with Vice President Kamala Harris, why is former President Trump campaigning in blue states?
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 5th Circuit Court orders federal judge removed from Texas foster care lawsuit
item.description: U.S. District Judge Janis Jack, the state’s de facto foster care czar, has been overseeing the case since 2011.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Terri Langford, KPRC 2

item.title: No Dem effort to stymie Trump election win certification: Strategists
item.description: A few Democratic lawmakers say they will accept a free and fair Trump election win, but aren't sure he'll be fair or honest.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Comer slams Raskin over his election certification comments: 'Ultimate hypocrite'
item.description: House Oversight Chairman James Comer (R-Ky.) condemned comments from Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-Md.), calling him “the ultimate hypocrite” after the Democrat claimed former President Trump is trying to manipulate the electoral college.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Trump campaign seeks increased security as election draws near, including military aircraft amid Iran threats
item.description: President Biden on Friday said he will grant the Trump campaign the extra security is it requesting as he continues to campaign for the presidency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Henderson City Council candidate Dr. Monica Larson discusses government transparency, public safety, and housing
item.description: Henderson City Council candidate Dr. Monica Larson joined the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide Friday to discuss issues she believes need to be addressed in the city.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Prepared to sit out election over war abroad, a young Minnesota voter finds her way back into the fold
item.description: As the Democratic presidential ticket changed, a young voter came around to supporting it despite her frustrations with U.S. policy toward war in the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Trump swipes at Detroit during speech in Motor City
item.description: Former President Donald Trump on Thursday bashed the city of Detroit as a “mess” and called it a developing area during a speech in the Motor City.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Biden calls VP Harris 'president' at hurricane briefing after being interrupted twice
item.description: President Biden once again referred to Vice President Kamala Harris incorrectly as the "president" during a press briefing on hurricane recovery efforts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Battle to shore up bases remains as Election Day nears
item.description: MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst and his guest talks about deadly conflicts in the Middle East and how those have factored into domestic politics. Plus, we follow up with two Generation Z voters about how they’re approaching the election.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Who could replace interim NYPD Commissioner Donlon if he resigns?
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon is expected to resign following a string of high-profile exits from City Hall over the last month, sources told PIX11 News on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Hurricane misinformation causing misery for survivors: Abrams
item.description: Radio caller tells Dan Abrams a relative believes that if he accepts hurricane relief from FEMA, the government could take his house.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: How to watch the NY-18 Debate: Ryan vs. Esposito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Candidates in the race for New York’s 18th Congressional District will face off in a debate Wednesday night. Democratic incumbent Congressman Pat Ryan will take on Republican challenger Alison Esposito in a 60-minute debate moderated by PIX11’s Henry Rosoff.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, PIX 11

item.title: Some Minneapolis Metro Transit trains will switch to buses starting Oct. 9
item.description: Part of the Metro Transit’s Blue and Green Lines will be closed starting at 10 p.m. on Wednesday for scheduled maintenance. It will reopen by 3 a.m. Monday, Oct. 14.
item.dc:creator: Anika Besst, MPR News

item.title: Melania Trump waves off 'hand-swatting incident': A 'mere misunderstanding'
item.description: Melania Trump is waving off speculation that she didn't want to hold her husband's hand, chalking up images of her seemingly "swatting" away former President Donald Trump to a "mere misunderstanding.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: U.S. Treasury says tribally owned entities should be tax-exempt
item.description: Proposed new guidelines would clarify the decades-old question of whether tribal businesses or entities are exempt from federal taxes.
item.dc:creator: MPR News

item.title: Harris leads Trump among California Latino voters by 23 points
item.description: Vice President Harris holds a strong lead over former President Trump among California Hispanics, according to a Telemundo poll released Tuesday. The California survey contrasts with a similar poll released earlier this month of Florida Hispanic voters, which found Trump leading Harris.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, Fox 5

item.title: Poll: In the midst of a tight presidential race, Trump draws support from voters disillusioned with democracy
item.description: New polling shows this year’s Harris v. Trump presidential race is too close to call, with Trump drawing support from voters who are disillusioned with democracy. Results from the McCourtney Institute for Democracy’s Sept. 23-27, 2024 Mood of the Nation Poll.
item.dc:creator: Eric Plutzer and Craig Helmstetter, MPR News

item.title: Harris is pressed for more specifics in a wide-ranging interview with '60 Minutes'
item.description: The interview followed criticism from former President Donald Trump that Kamala Harris has been unwilling to sit for hard interviews. She was pressed on everything from her economic proposals to immigration.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Michael Naft discusses traffic safety, F1, and animal welfare in the Las Vegas valley
item.description: Michael Naft, incumbent county commissioner for District 8, joined Brian Loftis on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide Monday, discussing his campaign priorities as election day nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Supreme Court won't hear arguments in Texas emergency abortion case
item.description: The Supreme Court decided not to hear arguments in a case involving Texas that could have provided an answer about whether a state abortion ban conflicts with a federal emergency care law.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, Fox 5

item.title: Minnesota Republicans seek a reset after two years of DFL trifecta in St. Paul
item.description: All 134 Minnesota House seats are on the ballot this fall, along with one state Senate seat. The results could flip political control of the Legislature.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5
